title: lycopersicon esculentum var. pyriforme
intro: Lycopersicon esculentum var. pyriforme, also known as the pear-shaped or pear tomato, is a variety of the tomato plant that exhibits a distinct pear-like shape. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high antioxidant content and ability to reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of consuming Lycopersicon esculentum var. pyriforme include reducing the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and certain cancers, as well as supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include fresh or dried fruit, which can be consumed raw or used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
